notes: Command your called-in pirates. Once a crew you've summoned is standing by, you can now tell them to 🛰️ Follow — they'll jump where you jump for several cycles, staying on hand to join raids and escorts wherever you roam — or ✖ Stand down to send them home early (and Recall a crew that's still inbound). A following crew's location tracks yours each cycle, so they're callable anywhere; when the follow window runs out they peel off but linger briefly. Builds on 2.17/2.18 (tags, locations, call-for-support, smuggling runs).
